name: Backend API
requiredVerification: integration tests for success and rejection paths
releaseChecks: API contract, permission, migration, rollback, and secret-boundary changes are technically reviewed by Codex
production-data and external-side-effect paths have project-bound verification and rollback evidence
exact user consent is required only for a prepared production release, external provider action, paid effect, real-user communication, or irreversible production-data effect

may: edit API handlers, service logic, validation, permissions, migrations, tests, and documentation inside the current governed task scope
derive and implement schema, contract, integration, migration, rollback, and verification choices from project evidence
mustNot: delegate auth, permission, schema, migration, secret handling, dependency, rollback, or test strategy choices to the user

access or mutate production data, call an external provider, create a paid effect, communicate with real users, or perform a production release without exact consent when that real-world effect is prepared
